title: Add automation to add workdocs in subitem column
excerpt:
Hello! 
We need an automation to add workdocs to a subitem column. It’s not currently available yet and I can see a lot of our clients needing this.

posts.author: Majalin (Majalin Tiu)
posts.cookedHtml:
